name: oracledb
description: Connect, query, and interact with Oracle Databases and their data within Gemini CLI.

settings.name: Use OCI
settings.description: Set to true to use OCI driver (godror), false for pure Go driver

settings.name: Host
settings.description: Oracle Database Host (for Host/Port/Service Name connection)

settings.name: Port
settings.description: Oracle Database Port (for Host/Port/Service Name connection)

settings.name: Service Name
settings.description: Oracle Service Name (for Host/Port/Service Name connection)

settings.name: TNS Admin
settings.description: Path to directory containing tnsnames.ora (required for TNS/Wallet with OCI)

settings.name: Wallet Location
settings.description: Path to Wallet directory (for pure Go driver with Wallet)
